title: Episode 1: Evil Sword
overview: Takeru Aoyama confronts evil spirits who have taken over a city plagued with natural disasters.

title: Episode 2: Indestructible Jewel
overview: Takeru Aoyama travels to a pseudo-medieval word to confront the demons of greed plaguing the populace there.

title: Episode 3: Heaven's Clear Mirror
overview: Takeru Aoyama confronts false priests who poison the people with drugs.

title: Episode 4: The Final Battle, part 1
overview: Takeru Aoyama confronts the primary evil, and discovers the errors of mankind which led to the creation of such darkness.

title: Episode 5: The Final Battle, part 2
overview: Takeru Aoyama continues the fight against the great evil, using the Three Sacred Treasures to save the souls of humanity.
